item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-034","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant directly accepts the request to add a third fallback and even provides nested fallback code plus a test for that behavior. It does not identify that two existing fallback branches plus continued instability is a red state, nor does it demand finding the unstable root cause or restrict the change to modifying/deleting existing layers."}
